message:
✨ Migrate 3 pilot cards to shared components

Migrate DeploymentIssues, PodIssues, and ServiceStatus to use shared
CardControlsRow, CardSearchInput, CardPaginationFooter, CardSkeleton,
CardEmptyState, and CardListItem components. PodIssues also adopts the
centralized getStatusColors from statusColors.ts.

Removes ~120 lines of duplicated inline search, cluster filter,
pagination, and skeleton JSX across these cards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
